title: Two Adjoining Wellness Villas with Pools and Ice Baths - Sanur
note: Two villas · book together or separately
blurb: A pair of adjoining wellness villas in Sanur that book together or separately — a larger four-bedroom villa and a three-bedroom neighbour, each with a private pool, an open-air gym and an ice bath, family bunk rooms and open-plan living, a short walk from the beach.
detail:
The two villas stand side by side on roughly 850 m² of land and can be taken together or one at a time. The larger of them rises over three floors, with living, dining and two guest rooms at ground level, the master and further rooms above, and an al fresco dining kitchen and gym on top. Its neighbour spans two floors, with living, dining and a guest room below and the master, a second guest room and a bunk room upstairs. Together they offer up to seven bedrooms plus two bunk rooms, sleeping as many as fourteen.

Each villa centres on an open-plan, air-conditioned living and dining room and an open kitchen, with a dedicated media room — one with a large smart TV, the other a projector and surround sound. Both have a private pool with a child-friendly shallow end, sunbeds and an open-air gym with an ice bath, and the larger villa adds a sunken swim-up bar and an infrared sauna. A bunk room in each makes the pair genuinely family-friendly.

Newly opened and fully staffed, each villa comes with a manager, service team, gardener and security, daily breakfast and housekeeping, and a private chef on request. Thoughtful landscaping and solar panels keep the interiors cool and the footprint light. The setting is a calm stretch of Sanur, a short walk from restaurants and the white sand of a nearby beach.

The two villas book together or separately: Villa 1 (four bedrooms plus a bunk room) from $680 per night; Villa 2 (three bedrooms plus a bunk room) from $590 per night.
